_comment: One file per procedure_code. Distilled from the matching pair in PM JAY/Standard Treatment Guideline/master/<condition>/ : _Medco.pdf (clinical + mandatory docs) + _PPD.CPD.pdf (PPD/CPD processing checklists). Filename = procedure_code. This is what the Documentation Checker, Query Predictor, and Medical Justification agents read AFTER the picker has chosen the code.

preauth.label: Clinical Notes including evaluation findings, indications for the procedure, and planned line of treatment

claim.label: Detailed Indoor case papers with treatment details

ppd_preauth.q: Were the Clinical Notes including evaluation findings, indications for the procedure, and planned line of treatment submitted?
Was the Erythrocyte Sedimentation Rate (ESR) report submitted?
Were the X ray report / MRI / CT scan report submitted?
Did X-ray report show presence of fluid collection?

cpd_claim.q: Was the Detail Indoor case papers and Treatment details submitted?
Was the post treatment Chest x-ray, Electrocardiogram submitted?
Was the detailed Discharge Summary with 15 days of follow-up mentioned?

common_queries: X-ray report does not indicate presence of fluid collection.
Clinical notes including evaluation findings, indications for the procedure, or planned line of treatment missing or incomplete.
X-ray / MRI / CT scan (Chest) report missing.
Detailed Indoor case papers with treatment details missing or incomplete.
Post treatment Chest x-ray or Post treatment Electrocardiogram missing.
Detailed Discharge Summary missing or does not include 15 days of follow-up.

additional_information.min_doctor_qualification_desirable: MD / DNB/Equivalent (in General Medicine, Pediatric Medicine)
